title: Display bike logo image to the left of the Cleanio wordmark in the header

requirements.summary: Place the bike logo image to the left of the 'Cleanio' wordmark in the Layout component header, sourced from the generated asset, sized proportionally to fit the header height, and displayed inline beside the brand name on all pages.
acceptanceCriteria: The bike logo image appears immediately to the left of the 'Cleanio' text in the sticky header on all pages.
The logo height is proportional and fits within the header bar without overflow or distortion.
The logo and wordmark are visually aligned (vertically centered) in the header.

file_operations.description: Add an img element sourcing frontend/public/assets/generated/cleanio-logo.dim_400x120.png to the left of the 'Cleanio' wordmark in the header. Use Tailwind classes to size the logo proportionally (e.g., h-8 or h-10) and align it vertically with the brand text using flexbox (flex items-center gap-2). Ensure the logo and wordmark are wrapped in a container that maintains their inline relationship and vertical centering within the sticky header bar.
